arts.sum: Midfielder Pape Gueye has explained what happened at Watford and how he ended up locked in a legal battle with them. Foot Mercato cover a story on him today on their account on X after he appeared on the Oui Hustle podcast to discuss his career to date. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace in picture to sign Watford man – Player could ‘embrace new challenge’ next season
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have identified Watford’s Edo Kayembe as a transfer target for next season, according to Africa Foot. The midfielder arrived at Vicarage Road from Belgian side KAS Eupen in January 2022 and has been a regular since last season.
